snippet.title: Jack Bowles Invitational v2: Double the Action
snippet.description:
The Second Installment of the Jack Bowles Invitational. It’s longer (pause) and better then ever before. Watch as White Shirts, Child Predators, 2&1/2 White Guys, and Straight Comedy battle it out until the final buzzer and compete for championship game.

Music:
Take me to the King - Tamela Mann
New Turban - Bus Snatchers 
2023 - RTR Jae
New Slaves Outro - Kanye West, Frank Ocean
ILoveUIHateU - Playboi Carti
Not Allowed - TV Girl
Drip Too Hard x Hot N***a - Lil Baby, Bobby Shmurda
Track Star (Baltimore Remix) - BippleyipSnip
24 Songs - Playboi Carti
On the Way - RTR Jae
Rock & Roll - Yuno Miles
Goodbye - Gumball Waterson

Chapters:
0:00 Intro
1:50 Stuff That Happened Before
4:23 Pre-Game Interviews
9:05 White Shirts vs 2 1/2 White Guys
22:11 Post Game 1 (WS vs 2&1/2WGs)
22:34 Straight Comedy vs Child Predators
35:48 Straight Comedy vs 2 1/2 White Guys
38:58 Danajah’s Monologue
40:09 When Straight Comedy turned into Straight Business.
47:45 Championship Game
57:57 Awards/All-JBI Teams
1:05:00 Outro.
1:06:17 Xavier’s Fast Play: Bonus Content
1:08:10 Outro. 2

snippet.title: 3v3: The Jack Bowles Invitational
snippet.description:
This is the most basketball game ever. Not the worst, not the best, but it’s basketball. The enjoyment levels vary to viewers but it’s entertainment regardless. This video took a long time to edit but another invitational is in the works🤫🤐.

Music Played:
Bus Snatchers - New Turban
Drake - Sticky
Michael Jackson - Wanna Be Startin’ Something
Meek Mill - I’m a Boss (Sped Up)
RTR Jae - 2023
Bus Snatchers - Ride to Milwaukee 
Yuno Miles - Benjamin Button


Chapters: 
0:07 The Morning Of
1:06 Sticky (Pause)
1:49 Fit Check
2:20 Warmups
4:27 Pre-Game Interviews
6:43 Jerseys vs White Power
13:18 Post Game 1 Check-Up
13:52 Jerseys vs Whites
18:51 Post Game 2 Check-Up
19:00 Whites vs White Power
21:47 Championship Game
25:42 Ending Interviews
28:10 Outro.
